summary: Record the bounded aggregate verification after the MCP pending-review queue: 172 files and 1268 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Run one aggregate suite after the pending-review queue crossed MCP handler, validation, and state seams; stop while green.
decisions.rationale: Focused tests, lint, and build were green; one aggregate run is sufficient evidence without a test loop.

testEvidence.criterion: Existing application behavior remains green after MCP review queue integration.
testEvidence.test: Run the complete Vitest suite once after the queue commit.

red.outcome: No red run was required; focused queue/handler tests, lint, and build were green before this bounded aggregate.

green.outcome: GREEN: 172 test files passed and 1268 tests passed in 19.81s.

questions: Desktop review UI, approval-to-runtime-dispatch path, MCP process/toggle integration, and hosted AC-11.b/c evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
